description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low stone wall and landscaped with palm trees at each corner. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and skylights, and a combination of white and light wood exterior finishes. Large glass windows and sliding doors are present, especially on the side facing the garden, allowing for ample natural light. The front includes a wide driveway leading to a double garage with a dark, textured surface. The backyard area appears to have a patio or pool space, partially enclosed by the building's L-shaped layout. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and wood finishes, large windows, and a landscaped yard with palm trees and a stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, and a row of palm trees along the stone wall.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the patio or pool area, large glass doors, and a more private garden space.
description_view_2: Side view with prominent floor-to-ceiling windows and a clear view of the L-shaped layout and backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, secondary entrance, and additional outdoor paved area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
